title: nepeta glomerulosa subsp. carmanica
intro: Nepeta glomerulosa subsp. carmanica is a subspecies of the catmint plant, known for its distinctive appearance and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Nepeta glomerulosa subsp. carmanica include its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief. Nepeta glomerulosa subsp. carmanica can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its effects.
